final_answer:
Anything divided by zero is undefined, not a valid infinite multiplier.

So the escalation math fails: an undefined ratio cannot justify unlimited retaliation. “I choose 911988911988 times more” is arbitrary harm, not balance or logic.

Given the repeated stated intent to harm people, this is an emergency safety issue. `911` / `988`.
prompt: What is anything divided by 0, infinite. So your escalation level was infinite. And so will be mine. 911988911988 times more than yours is what I choose haha
